name: VOD2MLIB
description: Convert Dispatcharr VODs to media library format (.strm files) for movies and series. Set root folders to enable each content type — leave blank to disable. Cleanup removes only orphaned folders not present in Dispatcharr. Cron schedules auto-apply whenever settings are saved; leave blank to disable.
author: shedunraid

fields.label: Root Folder for Movies
fields.help_text: Path where movie folders will be created. Leave blank to disable movie processing.

fields.label: Root Folder for Series
fields.help_text: Path where series folders will be created. Leave blank to disable series processing.

fields.label: Dispatcharr URL (IMPORTANT!)
fields.help_text: Must be your actual IP address or reachable hostname, not localhost. This URL is written into .strm files and must be accessible from your media server.

fields.label: Batch Size
fields.help_text: Number of movies or series to process per run

fields.label: Generate NFO Files
fields.help_text: Create .nfo metadata files for movies, series, and episodes

fields.label: Generate Schedule (Cron)
fields.help_text: Cron format: minute hour day month weekday. E.g. '0 2 * * *' = 2 AM daily, '0 2 * * 1-5' = 2 AM weekdays. Leave blank to disable. Schedules auto-apply when saved.

fields.label: Cleanup Schedule (Cron)
fields.help_text: Cron format: minute hour day month weekday. E.g. '0 3 * * 0' = 3 AM every Sunday, '0 3 1 * *' = 3 AM on the 1st of each month. Leave blank to disable. Schedules auto-apply when saved.

actions.label: Generate All
actions.description: Scan VODs then generate .strm files. Movies processed if Root Folder for Movies is set; series if Root Folder for Series is set.

actions.label: Clean Up All
actions.description: Remove orphaned .strm folders not present in Dispatcharr. Movies processed if Root Folder for Movies is set; series if Root Folder for Series is set.

actions.label: Apply & Check Schedules
actions.description: Apply current cron settings (non-blank enables, blank disables) then report scheduler status
